title: halimium umbellatum
intro: Halimium umbellatum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow or pink flowers and shrub-like growth. The medicinal properties of Rock Rose include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Halimium umbellatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rock Rose include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and soothe the nervous system.
